title: dependency-map
description: Cross-domain input/output dependencies for this submission. Drives assessment sequencing and parallelism. Produced by gap-analyst. Consumed by pre-assess-output-agent, scope-determinator, domain-assessor.

independent_domains.description: Domain IDs that have no upstream dependencies — can be assessed in parallel.

dependent_domains.description: Domains that depend on one or more upstream domains completing first.

upstream_dependencies.description: Domain IDs that must complete before this domain can be assessed.

dependency_rationale.description: Why this domain depends on the upstream domains.

sequencing_plan.description: Ordered assessment sequence — batches of parallel domains followed by dependent domains.

cross_domain_dependencies.description: Specific module-level cross-domain dependencies within the active framework.
